name: 9' Round Valance Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella Green Sprinkle Stripe - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Fade-Resistant, Crank Lift
description:
Stay cool and comfortable outdoors with this Round Valance Outdoor Patio Market Umbrella Green Sprinkle Stripe from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This patio market umbrella in a white color features green stripes on the valance for a chic, contrasting look. Supported on a beige steel frame, it's designed with a round vented canopy made from fade-resistant fabric for lasting outdoor use. Plus, it's equipped with a crank lift system that makes it easy to raise and lower the canopy, along with push-button tilt for more shading angles.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
